holders.description: Right-hand short head holder for parting and grooving on CNC lathes. Supports narrow widths with modification for 1mm inserts.
holders.geometry: Designed for external grooving and parting. Pocket supports DGN/R/L inserts; modifiable for 1mm widths (depth capacity table available).
compatible_inserts: DGN/R/L 1-2.5mm (e.g., DGN 2002J IC908, DGR 2202, DGL 2002; 1mm in pockets 2/3 with mod)

holders.type: SVJB 93° KM Micro Cutting Unit (OD Application)
holders.description: S-Clamping cutting unit for external turning and OD applications in the KM Micro quick-change system. Supports positive style inserts for precise machining.
holders.geometry: 93° approach angle for OD turning. Optimized for positive rake inserts with sintered chipbreaker options.
compatible_holders: KM Micro adapters (e.g., CV40KM16TRA, KM16NCMSF1928, KM16NCM1616100)
compatible_inserts: VBGT/VBMT 1103.. series (e.g., VBGT110301LF KC730, VBMT110304LF K313, in grades KC730, K313, K68 for steel/stainless/cast iron/non-ferrous/high-temp/hardened materials)

holders.type: LSS HPC KM Micro Cutting Unit (OD Application)
holders.description: High-pressure coolant (HPC) cutting unit for OD applications in the KM Micro system. Features left-hand clamping for efficient chip evacuation and cooling.
holders.geometry: Straight shank with HPC channels for optimal coolant delivery. Neutral orientation allows flexible setup for various cutting directions.
compatible_machines: Lathes with KM quick-change and HPC capability
compatible_inserts: VBGT/VBMT 1103.. series (e.g., VBGT110301LF KC730, VBMT110304LF K313, in grades KC730, K313 for various materials)
holders.price_range: $250 - $300 (estimated based on similar KM Micro units)

holders.type: SVJB 93° KM Micro Cutting Unit (OD Application)
holders.description: S-Clamping cutting unit for external turning and OD applications in the KM Micro quick-change system. Right-hand version for precise machining with positive inserts.
holders.geometry: 93° approach angle for OD turning. Optimized for positive rake inserts with options for chipbreaker geometries.
compatible_holders: KM Micro adapters (e.g., CV40KM16TRA, KM16NCMSF1928, KM16NCM1616100)
compatible_inserts: VBGT/VBMT 1604.. series (e.g., VBGT160401LF KC730, VBMT160404LF KC730, in grades KC730, K313, K68 for steel/stainless/cast iron/non-ferrous/high-temp/hardened materials)

inserts.description: Neutral parting and grooving insert with J-type chipformer. Suitable for soft materials, tubes, small diameters, and thin-walled parts at low-to-medium feeds.
inserts.geometry: J-type chipformer with positive configuration and reinforced negative frontal edge. Sharp corner (JS variant available). DGNM single-ended design.
compatible_machines: CNC lathes for external/face grooving, parting, and internal face grooving
